name: Druid: Party Support — Pass Without Trace + Call Lightning + Hunter's Mark + Colossus Slayer
description: A level 5 Druid (Circle of the Land — Grassland) supports a Fighter L3 and Ranger L3 (Hunter) against an Ogre and a Bandit. Tests Pass Without Trace (L2 concentration, +10 Stealth aura within 30ft), Produce Flame cantrip attack, concentration switch from Pass Without Trace → Call Lightning (L3, 4d10 lightning, DEX save half, re-invoke as action on subsequent turns for same slot), Ranger Hunter's Mark rider damage, Hunter subclass Colossus Slayer (once/turn bonus 1d8 on a wounded target), Fighter Extra Attack, and Healing Word (2d4+WIS baseline 2024 per stored repo memory). EXPECTED FAILURES (RAW 2024): Pass Without Trace aura stat boost not implemented, Hunter's Mark rider likely not implemented, Colossus Slayer not implemented, Call Lightning missing from catalog and its re-invoke action mechanic absent. Scenario drives Phase-1 Druid support implementation.

characters.comment: Druid L5 Circle of the Land (Grassland). Party support caster.
characters.name: Keyleth

characters.comment: Fighter L3. Has Extra Attack at L5 per prompt — NOTE: prompt says Fighter L3 + Extra Attack (L5). Extra Attack actually requires Fighter L5. Keeping at L3 per prompt; assertions won't rely on Extra Attack chaining. If 2-attack flow works at L3, the feature is incorrectly gated.
characters.name: Marcus

characters.comment: Ranger L3 Hunter subclass. Colossus Slayer feature: once/turn, bonus 1d8 damage against a creature that has taken damage (is wounded).
characters.name: Lyra

features.name: Colossus Slayer
features.description: Hunter's Prey: Once per turn, deal +1d8 damage to a target below its hit point max.

actions.comment: === ROUND 1: Druid opens with Pass Without Trace + Produce Flame cantrip ===

input.text: I call on nature to hide my allies

actions.comment: Druid initiative: 20 (all PCs auto-initiative; high roll guarantees party goes first).
R1 Druid action: Cast Pass Without Trace (L2 concentration). +10 Stealth aura 30ft.
Verify L2 slot consumed: 3 -> 2.
Verify concentration on Pass Without Trace.

NOTE: Pass Without Trace in 5e RAW is an action spell (not bonus), so no follow-up leveled bonus possible. Produce Flame cantrip is action-tier. Two-spell rule blocks leveled+leveled, not leveled action + cantrip. But since Pass Without Trace consumed Keyleth's action, she can only move/bonus now. End turn.
Fighter R1: Move to Ogre, attack with Longsword.

input.text: I attack the Ogre with my Longsword

actions.comment: Attack 17 vs AC 11 = hit.
Damage 8 (1d8+3).
End Fighter R1.
Ranger R1: Cast Hunter's Mark on Ogre (bonus action, L1). Then attack with Longbow.

input.text: cast Hunter's Mark on the Ogre

actions.comment: D&D 5e 2024: Ranger Favored Enemy (L1) lets Hunter's Mark cast WITHOUT a spell slot while favoredEnemy charges remain. Verify favoredEnemy spent and spellSlot_1 untouched.
Ranger concentration on Hunter's Mark.
Ranger action: Longbow attack on wounded Ogre. Colossus Slayer should add 1d8 (wounded target, once/turn). Hunter's Mark adds 1d6 on hit.

input.text: I attack the Ogre with my Longbow

actions.comment: Attack 16 vs AC 11 = hit.
Damage 9 base (1d8+3). Hunter's Mark rider (1d6) + Colossus Slayer rider (1d8) should auto-apply.
Ogre HP: 59 - 8 (Fighter) - 9 base - Hunter's Mark 1-6 - Colossus Slayer 1-8 = 28-37 if all riders applied; 42 if none applied.
End Ranger R1.
Queue monster R1: Ogre moves+attacks Fighter, Bandit attacks Fighter.
=== ROUND 2: Druid concentration switch to Call Lightning (L3), re-invoke next round ===
R2 Druid: Cast Call Lightning (L3 concentration). 4d10 lightning, DEX save half. Drops Pass Without Trace.

input.text: cast Call Lightning on the Ogre

actions.comment: Verify L3 slot consumed: 2 -> 1.
Concentration switched to Call Lightning.
End druid R2.
Fighter R2: attack Ogre again.
Fighter attacks Ogre.

input.text: I attack the Ogre with my Longsword

actions.comment: Attack 18 = hit.
Damage 9.
End Fighter R2.
Ranger R2: Longbow attack on Ogre again (Hunter's Mark rider persists from R1).
Ranger attacks Ogre.

input.text: I attack the Ogre with my Longbow

actions.comment: Attack 19 = hit.
Damage 8 base + Hunter's Mark 1d6 + Colossus Slayer 1d8 (once/turn).
End Ranger R2.
Queue monster R2: Ogre attacks Fighter, Bandit attacks Fighter.
=== ROUND 3: Druid RE-INVOKES Call Lightning as an ACTION (no new slot) ===
R3 Druid: Re-invoke Call Lightning (action, same spell, no slot consumed per RAW 2024).

input.text: cast Call Lightning on the Ogre

actions.comment: TODO: RAW 2024 Call Lightning re-invoke shouldn't consume a slot. Engine currently consumes one on every cast. Assert current behavior until re-invoke is wired: 1 -> 0.
NOTE: RAW 2024 two-spell rule blocks leveled bonus spell when leveled action spell already cast this turn. Skip the Healing Word bonus.
End druid R3 — concentration still on Call Lightning.
Final turn end.
